archetype: Electric & Neon (7) customized with Crystal Glassmorphism (High-End Apple Style)

typography.font_strategy: The 'Swiss Brutalist' adapted for Developer Tech.

headings.rules: H1 up to text-5xl sm:text-6xl. DO NOT center-align unless explicit hero section. Never use Inter for headings.

mono.rules: Use for Code Editor, Readiness Scores, Badges, and Terminal elements.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing (p-8, p-12) for landing/marketing flows; 'Control Room' Bento Grid for the AI Gap Engine Dashboard.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Mobile-First. Grid items must be direct children. Avoid centered standard blocks; use asymmetry and overlapping glass panels.

surface_styles.tracing_beam_card: relative overflow-hidden border border-white/10 bg-black/40 backdrop-blur-md group hover:border-[#00f2fe]/50 transition-colors duration-500
surface_styles.rules: Never use transparent backgrounds without blur. Crystal glass must feel like milled crystal - smooth, premium, with 1px delicate inner stroke.

components.buttons: bg-gradient-to-r from-[#00f2fe] to-[#4facfe] text-black font-semibold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(0,242,254,0.4)] transition-all duration-300 transform hover:-translate-y-1 hover:text-black
components.secondary_buttons: bg-white/5 border border-white/10 text-white rounded-full px-6 py-3 hover:bg-white/10 transition-colors backdrop-blur-md
components.inputs: bg-black/50 border border-white/10 rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:outline-none focus:border-[#00f2fe] focus:ring-1 focus:ring-[#00f2fe] transition-all backdrop-blur-md
components.skill_badge: px-3 py-1 rounded-full text-xs font-mono bg-[#00f2fe]/10 text-[#00f2fe] border border-[#00f2fe]/20 uppercase tracking-[0.1em]
components.score_visualizer: Recharts radial bar with cyan to blue gradient. Add glow effect using drop-shadow SVG filter. Center text uses JetBrains Mono.

animations.card_tilt: Use Framer Motion 'useMotionValue' and 'useTransform' to create a 3D tilt effect on mouse move for the Proof-of-Skill card.

hero_background.description: Dark ceiling texture. Apply a subtle mix-blend-mode or grayscale + cyan tint overlay to match the neon theme. Use as a deeply blurred atmospheric background.

code_simulation_bg.description: Dark mode code editor screen. Use as a subtle opacity pattern behind the simulation task layout.

sponsor_logo.description: Example company logo representing the Job Description target company (simulate a Mercedes hiring profile).

resume_visual.description: Resume reference image to use in onboarding/upload instructions if necessary.

pages_and_flows.landing_upload_stage: Centered crystal glass panel taking 60% width on desktop. Two main inputs: Resume drag-and-drop zone + Job Description URL field. A glowing CTA 'Analyze Gap'. Background features subtle animated cyan neon blobs behind the glass.
pages_and_flows.analysis_dashboard: Bento Grid (Control Room Mode) using 'gap-6'. Top left (col-span-1): 3D Radial Readiness Score glowing in neon cyan. Top right (col-span-2): Job Role Meta Data & Match breakdown. Bottom full width: 3 Missing Industry Skills displayed as horizontal glass cards with glowing 'Start Simulation' CTAs.
pages_and_flows.simulation_stage: Split screen layout. Left (glass panel): The Missing Skill brief and logic instructions. Right: @monaco-editor/react component or custom Logic Puzzle UI. Minimalist header. Use `framer-motion` for smooth layout ID transitions.
pages_and_flows.proof_of_skill: A final celebratory screen. A 3D interactive 'NFT-style' Proof-of-Skill card. Contains the user's name, the skill verified, the readiness score, and a 'Verified by AI' hologram badge. Features canvas-confetti on entry and shareable social buttons below.

technical_rules.html_elements: Use Shadcn customized components. DO NOT use native HTML <select>, <input type='date'>. Use raw HTML + Tailwind for structural layouts rather than Shadcn's Card, to achieve overlapping and bento grid asymmetry.
technical_rules.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., `data-testid='resume-upload-zone'`).
technical_rules.accessibility: Ensure text contrast over glass panels. Use 1px inner borders (`border-white/10`) on glass cards to define edges. Must respect prefers-reduced-motion for framer animations.

instructions_to_main_agent: Install the required libraries immediately: framer-motion, lucide-react, recharts, react-dropzone, @monaco-editor/react, canvas-confetti, clsx, tailwind-merge.
Build the application as a Single-Page Application (SPA) with smooth step-by-step state transitions.
Do NOT use placeholder text or dummy image URLs. ONLY use the media URLs provided in this JSON.
Apply the crystal glass surface style explicitly on major containers, avoiding flat gray/black backgrounds.
Use JetBrains Mono for all code-related typography, scores, and technical tags.
Ensure all buttons and links have hover states with increased text contrast or neon glow.
Prioritize optical alignment and generous padding (p-8 to p-12) to match the high-end Apple-style aesthetic.
